/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libinterfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libinterfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/base_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/contact_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/gait_phase__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/motion_command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/single_foot_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/foot_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/motor_command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/motor_command12__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/motor_feedback__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaces/msg/motor_feedback12__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lzh/VMC_Quadruped/build/interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libinterfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
